yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_The_Good_the_Bad_and_the_Ugly_in_Cyberse {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for The Good, the Bad and the Ugly in Cybersecurity – Week 11"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-14"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-RAN-02" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_FortiGate_Edge_Intrusions__Stolen_Servic {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for FortiGate Edge Intrusions | Stolen Service Accounts Lead to Rogue Workstations a"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-14"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "FortiGate" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
